When a reviewer opens a Cat III rabies or new leprosy case, the action drawer surfaces the matching DOH
protocol checklist with source citation, optional plain-language summary, and cluster alerts.

Always-on: audit log on every write
HealthSync · open development on GitHub · DOH-aligned by design
